# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong plugin misconfiguration.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  cors:
    global:
      enabled: true
      origins:
        - "https://example.com"
        - "http://localhost:3000"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Accept
        - Authorization

  key-auth:
    global:
      enabled: true
      key_in_header: x-api-key
      key_in_query: api_key
      hide_credentials: true

  rate-limiting:
    global:
      enabled: true
      name: rate_limiting
      requests_per_second: 10
      period: 1s

services:
  - id: my-service
    plugins:
      cors:
        enabled: true
        origins:
          - "https://example.com"
          - "http://localhost:3000"
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        headers:
          - Content-Type
          - Accept
          - Authorization

  - id: my-service-2
    plugins:
      key-auth:
        enabled: true
        key_in_header: x-api-key
        key_in_query: api_key
        hide_credentials: true

routes:
  - name: my-route
    paths:
      - /my-path
    services:
      - my-service
    plugins:
      rate-limiting:
        enabled: true
        requests_per_second: 5
        period: 1s
